info.title: Pages API
info.description:
Use the Pages API for managing your site pages in SitecoreAI.

This API lets you interact with your pages, including:
- Creating, updating, retrieving, and deleting pages.
- Retrieving versions and variants.
- Update layouts.

Note the following:
   - All API requests are made in your production environment.

 For more information, see the [official SitecoreAI developer documentation](https://doc.sitecore.com/xmc/en/developers/xm-cloud/getting-started-with-xm-cloud.html).

# Authorization
To authorize your requests, use environment automation client credentials and generate a JSON Web Token (JWT).

Note: To create client credentials, you must be an [Organization Admin](https://doc.sitecore.com/portal/en/developers/sitecore-cloud-portal/roles.html) or Organization Owner.

## Create an automation client
 1. In the Sitecore Cloud Portal, open SitecoreAI Deploy.
 2. Click **Credentials** > **Environment** > **Create credentials** > **Automation**.
 3. Fill out the automation client details, then click **Create**.
 4. Copy the client ID and the client secret because you won't be able to view them again in SitecoreAI Deploy. You'll use them to request a JWT.

## Request a JWT

Run the following cURL command to request a JWT. Replace the placeholder values with your client ID and client secret.
```curl
  curl -X POST 'https://auth.sitecorecloud.io/oauth/token' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \
  --data-urlencode 'client_id={YOUR_CLIENT_ID}' \
  --data-urlencode 'client_secret={YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET}' \
  --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' \
  --data-urlencode 'audience=https://api.sitecorecloud.io'
```

In the response, the `access_token` key contains the JWT:

```json
  {
    "access_token": "{YOUR_JWT}",
    "scope": "xmcloud.cm:admin",
    "expires_in": 86400,
    "token_type": "Bearer"
  }
```

The JWT expires in 24 hours. If your requests unexpectedly return a response with status `401 Unauthorized`, request a new JWT by repeating this `POST` request.

We recommend that you cache the JWT for 24 hours to avoid repeating this `POST` request while the JWT is still valid.

## Include the JWT in the request header

You can now start making REST API requests. You must include the JWT in the request header of every request. For example:
  ```curl
  curl -X GET '{YOUR_BASE_URL}/...' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_JWT}' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json'
  ```

get.description: Fetches a list of pages and folders whose name or display name match the search criteria, while applying filters and language options.

parameters.name: searchText
parameters.description: The text by which to search for the name or display name.

parameters.name: rootIds
parameters.description: If you want to limit the search to pages or folders under a specific parent, the list of identifiers to search under.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: The search filter. Possible values are "Pages" (items that have a presentation layout and can be rendered), "Folders" (items that use 'folder' as their base template), "All" (both pages and folders).

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: If you want to limit the search to items in a specific language, the language code of those items.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The page size of the results to return.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: The page number used to paginate the results.

example.title: Bad Request
example.detail: A detailed explanation, specific to this occurrence of the problem.

example.instance: If available, a URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

uid.description:
The unique identifier of the component on this page. The UID is assigned to the component when it's added to the page.
Example value: 3d42bec0-60ad-45f3-a8f7-ddb6a5543c34

name.description:
The component name.
Example value: RichText

displayName.description:
The display name of the component for the specified language.
Example value: Rich Text

language.description:
The language of the page.
Example value: en-US

name.description:
The page name.
Example value: Home

displayName.description:
The display name of the page for the specified language.
Example value: Home

components.description: A collection of the page components.

language.description:
The language of the page.
Example value: en-US

pages.description: Aggregated data of the currently active variants for this page.

language.description:
The language of the page.
Example value: en-US

variantIds.description:
The list of page personalization variant identifiers.
Example value: [
  "edc7cee9-14b5-4218-a7a8-13664c714bdb",
  "5f457136-fd9f-4a5b-be3f-2d46709f01a4"
]

language.description:
The language of the new page version.
Example value: en-US

site.description:
The site name.
Example value: my-site

baseVersion.description:
The base version number to create the new version from.
Example value: 1

versionName.description:
The name of the new version.
Example value: Black Friday content update

parentId.description:
The identifier of the parent page.
Example value: 9100b830-c85b-459b-9c37-51da74fc9ecc

pageName.description:
The system name of the new page.
Example value: about-us

blueprintId.description:
The identifier of the blueprint to be used for the new page.
Example value: 2341ef32-42f4-4537-98d8-9ef741008eab

language.description:
The language of the new page.
Example value: en-US

displayName.description:
The display name of the new page.
Example value: About Us

parentId.description:
The identifier of the parent page.
Example value: 9100b830-c85b-459b-9c37-51da74fc9ecc

pageName.description:
The system name of the new page.
Example value: about-us

templateId.description:
The identifier of the template to be used for the new page.
Example value: 2341ef32-42f4-4537-98d8-9ef741008eab

language.description:
The language of the new page.
Example value: en-US

displayName.description:
The display name of the new page.
Example value: About Us

permanently.description:
Whether the page should be permanently deleted (skipping the recycle bin).
Example value: True

forceDelete.description:
Whether the page should be forcefully deleted (skipping the references check).
Example value: True

newName.description:
The name for the new page.
Example value: About Us Copy

site.description:
The site name.
Example value: my-site

language.description:
The language of the duplicated page.
Example value: en-US

displayName.description:
The display name for the new page.
Example value: About Us Copy

LayoutKind.description: The type of layout (Final or Shared).

id.description:
The identifier of the page.
Example value: 110d559f-dea5-42ea-9c1c-8a5df7e70ef9

name.description:
The name of the page.
Example value: Home

displayName.description:
The display name of the page.
Example value: Home Page

path.description:
The path of the page.
Example value: /home

language.description:
The language of the page.
Example value: en-US

version.description:
The version number of the page.
Example value: 1

url.description:
The page URL path.
Example value: /about

icon.description:
Path to the icon associated with the page.
Example value: Applications/32x32/document_heart.png

versionName.description:
The name of the page version.
Example value: Black Friday content update

revision.description:
The revision of the page.
Example value: f7d29433-001e-4a35-a744-876759dba468

createdAt.description:
The date the page was created.
Example value: 2025-01-27T10:33:33Z

updatedAt.description:
The date the page was last updated.
Example value: 2025-01-27T10:39:02Z

createdBy.description:
The user who created the page.
Example value: john.doe@sitecore.com

updatedBy.description:
The user who last updated the page.
Example value: john.doe@sitecore.com

finalLayout.description:
The final layout of the page.
Example value: {\"devices\":[{\"id\":\"fe5d7fdf-89c0-4d99-9aa3-b5fbd009c9f3\",\"layoutId\":\"96e5f4ba-a2cf-4a4c-a4e7-64da88226362\",\"placeholders\":[],\"renderings\":[{\"id\":\"9c6d53e3-fe57-4638-af7b-6d68304c7a94\",\"instanceId\":\"ad5e15fb-896b-4415-8735-5e4d6b1543e1\",\"placeholderKey\":\"headless-main\",\"dataSource\":\"local:/Data/Text 1\",\"parameters\":{\"GridParameters\":\"{7465D855-992E-4DC2-9855-A03250DFA74B}\",\"FieldNames\":\"{940B57D1-13EA-429D-8C7E-2F6C1307B1B1}\",\"Styles\":\"\",\"RenderingIdentifier\":\"\",\"CSSStyles\":\"\",\"DynamicPlaceholderId\":\"1\"}}]}]}

sharedLayout.description:
The shared layout of the page.
Example value: {\"devices\":[{\"id\":\"fe5d7fdf-89c0-4d99-9aa3-b5fbd009c9f3\",\"layoutId\":\"96e5f4ba-a2cf-4a4c-a4e7-64da88226362\",\"placeholders\":[],\"renderings\":[]}]}

layoutEditingKind.description:
The type of layout for editing (Shared of Final).
Example value: Final

name.description:
The page's system name.
Example value: Home

displayName.description:
The page's display name.
Example value: Site Home

language.description:
The page language.
Example value: en-US

version.description:
The current version of the page.
Example value: 1

templateId.description:
The identifier of the template this page is based on.
Example value: 6fe7d6551e3d4c2780105777f06c6c4f

parentId.description:
The identifier of the page's parent.
Example value: 4bc0c81a280b4b13890b7b074b9d68f4

hasPresentation.description:
If set to true, this page can be rendered in the XM Cloud Pages application. This value is automatically set to false for the root item of the site, as well as for the folders if there are any.
Example value: True

hasChildren.description:
Whether the page has any child pages.
Example value: True

isLatestPublishableVersion.description:
Whether the page version is latest publishable version
Example value: True

path.description:
The path for the page.
Example value: Sitecore/Content/Home/Categories/Products/MyProduct

route.description:
The public-facing URL path relative to the site's root.
Example value: /Aboutus

name.description:
The name of the field.
Example value: Title

value.description:
The raw value of the field. While this is passed as a string, it can represent more complex values.
Example value: Welcome to our site

id.description:
The identifier of the field.
Example value: field-id-123

value.description:
The current value of the field.
Example value: Hello World

originalValue.description:
The original value of the field before any changes, useful for comparison or rollback scenarios.
Example value: Original Text

reset.description:
Whether the field value should be reset to its default state.
Example value: False

id.description:
The identifier of the field.
Example value: a73d057e-20e3-4ac3-9c06-5f34bfcb6847

value.description:
The new value of the field.
Example value: Welcome to our site

originalValue.description:
The original value of the field.
Example value: Welcome

reset.description:
The field reset status.
Example value: False

displayName.description:
Template display name
Example value: Page

body.description:
The body of the layout.
Example value: {"devices":[{"id":"fe5d7fdf-89c0-4d99-9aa3-b5fbd009c9f3","layoutId":"96e5f4ba-a2cf-4a4c-a4e7-64da88226362","placeholders":[],"renderings":[{"id":"9c6d53e3-fe57-4638-af7b-6d68304c7a94","instanceId":"ad5e15fb-896b-4415-8735-5e4d6b1543e1","placeholderKey":"headless-main","dataSource":"local:/Data/Text 1","parameters":{"GridParameters":"{7465D855-992E-4DC2-9855-A03250DFA74B}","FieldNames":"{940B57D1-13EA-429D-8C7E-2F6C1307B1B1}","Styles":"","RenderingIdentifier":"","CSSStyles":"","DynamicPlaceholderId":"1"}}]}]}

canUnlock.description:
Whether the current user can unlock the page for editing.
Example value: False

isLocked.description:
Whether the page is currently locked for editing.
Example value: False

lockedBy.description:
If the page is locked, the user who locked it.
Example value: john.smith@skate-park.com

lockedByCurrentUser.description:
Whether the page was locked by the current user.
Example value: False

name.description:
The system name of the page.
Example value: Home

displayName.description:
The display name of the page.
Example value: Site Home

path.description:
The path of the page.
Example value: /sitecore/content/collection01/site01/Home/about

displayName.description:
The display name of the page.
Example value: Site Home

revision.description:
The revision of the page.
Example value: f7d29433-001e-4a35-a744-876759dba468

finalLayout.description:
The final layout of the page.
Example value: {\"devices\":[{\"id\":\"fe5d7fdf-89c0-4d99-9aa3-b5fbd009c9f3\",\"layoutId\":\"96e5f4ba-a2cf-4a4c-a4e7-64da88226362\",\"placeholders\":[],\"renderings\":[{\"id\":\"9c6d53e3-fe57-4638-af7b-6d68304c7a94\",\"instanceId\":\"ad5e15fb-896b-4415-8735-5e4d6b1543e1\",\"placeholderKey\":\"headless-main\",\"dataSource\":\"local:/Data/Text 1\",\"parameters\":{\"GridParameters\":\"{7465D855-992E-4DC2-9855-A03250DFA74B}\",\"FieldNames\":\"{940B57D1-13EA-429D-8C7E-2F6C1307B1B1}\",\"Styles\":\"\",\"RenderingIdentifier\":\"\",\"CSSStyles\":\"\",\"DynamicPlaceholderId\":\"1\"}}]}]}

sharedLayout.description:
The shared layout of the page.
Example value: {\"devices\":[{\"id\":\"fe5d7fdf-89c0-4d99-9aa3-b5fbd009c9f3\",\"layoutId\":\"96e5f4ba-a2cf-4a4c-a4e7-64da88226362\",\"placeholders\":[],\"renderings\":[]}]}

layoutEditingKind.description:
The kind of layout for editing (Shared of Final).
Example value: Final

name.description:
The name of the page template.
Example value: MainPage

path.description:

The display name of the page template.

Whether the template is a branch template.
Example value: True

aborted.description:
Whether the operation was aborted.
Example value: true

errorLevel.description:
The level of the error.
Example value: High

errorMessage.description:
The error message.
Example value: Field value is required.

fieldId.description:
The identifier of the field that caused the error.
Example value: a73d057e-20e3-4ac3-9c06-5f34bfcb6847

pageId.description:
The identifier of the page.
Example value: 8f0b81bc-7388-46be-b109-6e73d1114470

displayName.description:
The display name of the page.
Example value: Site Home

versionNumber.description:
The version number of the page.
Example value: 2

id.description:
The identifier of the workflow state.
Example value: 77ac7ce9-803a-42e3-bb05-f79fca73cbce

displayName.description:
The display name of the workflow.
Example value: Page Workflow

finalState.description:
Whether the page is in the final workflow state.
Example value: True

canEdit.description:
Whether the page can be edited.
Example value: True

warnings.description: The list of warnings associated with the workflow.

icon.description:
Path to the icon associated with the workflow.
Example value: Applications/32x32/document_heart.png

commands.description: The list of commands available in the current workflow state.

totalCount.description:
The total number of pages found by the search.
Example value: 25

results.description: The collection of result pages returned by the search.

PagesSearchResult.description: The result of a page search, including the total count and a collection of result pages.

canAdmin.description:
Whether the current user has admin rights. Being an admin means that you control access permissions for other users, and have full read and write rights.
Example value: False

canWrite.description:
Whether the current user has permissions to edit values. Users with write access also have read access.
Example value: False

canCreate.description:
Whether the current user has permission to create entities.
Example value: False

canDelete.description:
Whether the current user has permission to delete entities.
Example value: False

canRename.description:
Whether the current user has permission to rename entities.
Example value: False

canRead.description:
Whether the current user has permission to see entities, including all their parameters.
Example value: False

canPublish.description:
Whether the current user has permission to publish sites in this environment.
Example value: False

canDuplicate.description:
Whether the current user has permission to duplicate entities.
Example value: False

canWriteLanguage.description:
Whether the current user has permission to write item language entities.
Example value: False

Permissions.description: The access rights of the current user to the site.

variantIds.description:
The collection of page variant identifiers.
Example value: [
  "4cf51e95-ee7e-4ad6-a69f-e4d740b03616",
  "d9584f11-07d3-4cda-8373-7f97ceedbc09"
]

Personalization.description: Represents personalization settings for a page.

type.description: The type of the error response entity.

title.description: The title of the error response entity.

detail.description: A detailed explanation, specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: If available, a URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

additionalProperties.description: Any additional optional properties that describe the error(s).

isPublishable.description:
Whether the page is publishable.
Example value: True

hasPublishableVersion.description:
Whether the page has a publishable version.
Example value: True

isAvailableToPublish.description:
Whether the page version is available to publish (version is not hidden).
Example value: True

validFromDate.description:
The date from which the page is available for publishing.
Example value: 2023-10-01T00:00:00Z

validToDate.description:
The date until which the page is available for publishing.
Example value: 2023-12-31T23:59:59Z

newName.description:
The new name for the page.
Example value: About Us

errorCode.description:
The error code.
Example value: ItemIsProtected

message.description:
The error message.
Example value: The page item is protected.

pageId.description:
The identifier of the page that caused the error.
Example value: 8f0b81bc-7388-46be-b109-6e73d1114470

fields.description: The field values for the page.

language.description:
The language of the page to save.
Example value: en-US

site.description:
The site name.
Example value: my-site

pageVersion.description:
The version number of the page to save.
Example value: 2

revision.description:
The revision identifier of the page to save.
Example value: f7d29433-001e-4a35-a744-876759dba468

language.description:
The language of the page to save.
Example value: en-US

site.description:
The site name.
Example value: my-site

pageVersion.description:
The version number of the page to save.
Example value: 2

revision.description:
The revision identifier of the page to save.
Example value: f7d29433-001e-4a35-a744-876759dba468

errors.description: The list of errors that occurred during the save operation.

validationErrors.description: The list of validation errors that occurred during the save operation.

warnings.description: The list of warnings that occurred during the save operation.

fields.description: The list of updated field values.

id.description:
The identifier of the saved page.
Example value: 8f0b81bc-7388-46be-b109-6e73d1114470

language.description:
The language of the saved page.
Example value: en-US

revision.description:
The revision identifier of the saved page.

version.description:
The version number of the saved page.
Example value: 2

TranslationStrategy.description: Specifies the strategy to use when translating: add a new version or skip if a version exists.

versionNumber.description:
The version number of the page to update.
Example value: 2

language.description:
The language of the page to update.
Example value: en-US

fields.description: The fields to update on the page.

hostName.description:
The host name of the URL.
Example value: www.skate-park.com

path.description:
The path component of the URL.
Example value: /products/item1

scheme.description:
The scheme (protocol) of the URL.
Example value: https

Url.description: The URL information for a page.

id.description:
The identifier of the workflow command.
Example value: cf6a557d-0b86-4432-bf47-302a18238e74

displayName.description:
The display name of the workflow command.
Example value: Submit

icon.description:
The icon associated with the workflow command.
Example value: office/16x16/submit.png

suppressComment.description: Specifies whether to suppress the comment form when executing the workflow command.

id.description:
The identifier of the page on which the warning occurred.
Example value: 8f0b81bc-7388-46be-b109-6e73d1114470

errorCode.description:
The error code of the warning.
Example value: SomeDatasourcesAreLocked

message.description:
The warning message.
Example value: Some of the page datasources are locked.
message.example: Some of the page datasources are locked.

tags.name: Aggregation
tags.description: The Aggregation API lets you fetch aggregated page data.

tags.name: Pages
tags.description:
The Pages API lets you create and manage the pages of your sites.
Learn more about [Pages](https://doc.sitecore.com/xmc/en/users/xm-cloud/pages.html).
